title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kizaru, Vegapunk, Chopper as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Birdie Kingdom (where chopper studied), South Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems it's about the island where Tanuki-chi is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A King of Modern Science, but his smarts have also been used to make many weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HACHINOSU - THE PIRATE ISLAND, NEW WORLD

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what? You crossed me earlier! I ain't letting that slide just to listen to some old fossil, matey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means this is no were hiding place then? You wanted to fool me with a decoy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, we already had an introduction when we did the signal jacking part.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All right! Let's hear it already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A very important man is making an announcement. Just go back to bed, dear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It hasn't stopped yet!! Mars, what are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was much more cautious than we gave him credit for.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: There is currently no stopping the broadcast!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impossible to determine how much he actually knows or what he intends to say now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But york told us he wished to carry the torch of the oharan scholars!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
